## 🔄 Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI changes
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] 🧪 Test additions or modifications
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI changes
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvements

## 🔗 Related Issues
<!-- Link related issues using keywords -->
- Closes #[issue number]
- Fixes #[issue number]
- Related to #[issue number]

## 🔍 Code Quality Checklist

### General
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Code is commented, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] No console.log statements left in production code
- [ ] No commented-out code blocks

### TypeScript
- [ ] All TypeScript errors resolved
- [ ] Proper type definitions added
- [ ] No `any` types used (unless absolutely necessary)
- [ ] Interfaces/types exported where needed

### React/Frontend
- [ ] Components are properly typed
- [ ] Hooks follow React best practices
- [ ] No memory leaks (useEffect cleanup)
- [ ] Accessibility standards followed (WCAG 2.1 AA)
- [ ] Responsive design implemented

### Backend/API
- [ ] API endpoints properly documented
- [ ] Error handling implemented
- [ ] Input validation added
- [ ] Security considerations addressed
- [ ] Database queries optimized

## 📋 Documentation
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Migration guide provided (for breaking changes)

## 🚀 Deployment Considerations
- [ ] Environment variables documented
- [ ] Database migrations included
- [ ] Build process tested
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing APIs
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained

## ⚡ Performance Impact
<!-- Describe any performance implications -->
- [ ] No performance regression
- [ ] Performance improvements included
- [ ] Bundle size impact assessed
- [ ] Database query performance considered

## 🔒 Security Considerations
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed
- [ ] Input sanitization implemented
- [ ] Authentication/authorization checked
- [ ] CORS settings reviewed
- [ ] Dependencies security audit passed

## 📊 Metrics & Monitoring
<!-- How will we track the success of this change? -->
- [ ] Relevant metrics identified
- [ ] Logging added for debugging
- [ ] Error tracking configured
- [ ] Performance monitoring in place

## 🎯 Reviewer Focus Areas
<!-- Guide reviewers on what to focus on -->
Please pay special attention to:
- [ ] Security implications
- [ ] Performance impact
- [ ] User experience changes
- [ ] API design
- [ ] Error handling
- [ ] Test coverage

## 📋 Pre-Submission Checklist
<!-- Complete before submitting the PR -->
- [ ] Branch is up to date with main/develop
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] Code builds without errors
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Screenshots/recordings added (if UI changes)
